title: Rewrite Load as yaml.Node parser
description: Replace rawManifest struct-based parsing with raw yaml.Node decoding. Extract base_dir manually, iterate top-level keys as owners.
acceptance: DocumentNode unwrap with empty doc error. Root MappingNode validation with HintError. base_dir extracted from yaml.Node as scalar string.

title: Add owners key short-circuit rejection
description: Detect legacy owners key and return migration HintError before any other validation.
acceptance: HintError with exact error/hint text per spec. Short-circuits before base_dir extraction. parseOwners() function removed.

title: Add R8 duplicate key validation
description: Reject duplicate top-level keys during root mapping iteration.
acceptance: Duplicate top-level keys rejected with error including key name. Non-scalar keys rejected.

title: Remove owners wrapper from generateYAML
description: Delete ownersKey/ownersVal nodes, append owner pairs directly to root mapping.
acceptance: ownersKey/ownersVal deleted. Owner nodes appended to mapping.Content. Blank line between base_dir and first owner preserved.

title: Update unit test YAML snippets
description: Remove owners: line and dedent owner blocks in all manifest_test.go YAML snippets.
acceptance: All owners: removed from YAML in manifest_test.go. All existing tests pass. No assertion changes.

title: Add QA unit tests Q1-Q3
description: Add regression tests for owners rejection, root-not-mapping, and short-circuit behavior.
acceptance: Q1: error contains exact migration text. Q2: error contains root mapping message. Q3: only owners error returned when base_dir also missing.

title: Update integration test YAML snippets
description: Remove owners: from all YAML in cmd/json_test.go via grep-and-update.
acceptance: All owners: removed from json_test.go YAML. All integration tests pass.

title: Add QA integration test Q4
description: Test that old-format manifest produces JSON error with migration hint.
acceptance: Exit code 2. JSON error field contains migration text. JSON hint field contains dedent instruction.

title: Update README manifest example
description: Remove owners: wrapper from manifest format example in README.md.
acceptance: README manifest example has no owners: wrapper. Owners are top-level keys.

title: Update CLAUDE.md manifest references
description: Update manifest format, validation rules, and structural references in CLAUDE.md.
acceptance: Manifest Format example updated. Validation rules R5/R8 updated. Project Structure description updated.
